etymology.description: phonetic 圥(圥) (lù, "phonetic component") + semantic 土(土) (tǔ, "earth; soil") = earth-related term with phonetic lù
etymology.interpretation: 坴 is a phono-semantic compound where the component 圥(圥) (lù) provides the phonetic value, while 土(土) (tǔ, "earth; soil") suggests its relation to earth. The character is primarily a phonetic component used in more complex characters.
